notes: Sweden alone (se) — strict-subset of #1 (Europe·cross which includes se). Rule 6 blocks until past #100; would work as recall at #101+.
Georgia alone (ge) — strict-subset of #46 (Asia red+white only-2 which includes ge). Rule 6 blocks until past #100; would work as recall at #101+.

13 sovereigns (ao, bb, bo, ec, gt, ht, ke, lk, mt, mz, om, sa, sz). Strict-superset of #50 (animal+coa+weapon → bo,ec,gt,lk). Rule 6 blocks until past #100; works as recall at #101+ — 'you saw the 4 with animal+coa+weapon, which 9 other flags have weapons?'.
Iconic but {fi, gr} is a strict subset of #1 (Europe·cross — both have crosses). Rule 6 blocks until past #100, where subsets are allowed as a recall mechanic.

19 default / 15 primary — NOT primary-clean (hr, sm, va, rs have yellow only in COA). Strict-superset of #8 (Europe RBY only-3 → ad,ro), #11 (Europe·star/moon → ba,hr,mk,si), and #23 (Europe BY only-2 → se,ua). Rule 5 (primary-clean) and rule 6 (no-subset) both block until #101+; would need primaryCleanExempt to ever ship before then.

9 flags: am, bt, cy, ci, in, ie, ne, lk, zm. Primary-clean ✓. The !Oceania exclusion only drops Marshall Islands (mh, ns=6) — essentially 'orange flags worldwide minus the obscure one'. Strict-superset of #17 (OWG only-3 → cy,ci,ie,ne) blocks until #101+ (rule 6). Soft rule 10 also flags it: color:orange is a small property (10 sovereigns) and the technically-correct phrasing should be solo. Works as recall at #101+.
